comment.body:
Centroid is at 6770.52 - 6800.42
Interestingly a significant put spread is being sold in this region, that creats stickiness towards 6800 after 2PM. This spread is new, it came overnight (there was a sold spread below yesterday), telling me that market has a cautious optimism about holding the downside. But if the centroid is broken, for too long, the structure breaks.
